untranslatable_reason: Order book imbalance (bid/ask size ratio) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal explicitly requires real-time order book data (bid size vs ask size), which cannot be replicated using OHLCV-derived indicators like vol_ratio_20. This is a market microstructure signal requiring Level 2 data unavailable in backtest engine.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using vol_ratio_20 as a volume-based imbalance metric, but this does not capture the true bid/ask size imbalance required by the original signal. High-frequency momentum strategies based on order book microstructure require tick-level or Level 2 order book data, not available in standard OHLCV backtesting.
